CONTENT.Club career: Born in Strasbourg, Mamadou Diakhon joined the Stade de Reims academy in 2021.He made his professional debut for Reims on the 27 May 2023, before signing his first professional contract with the club on the summer 2023.
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Diakhon is of Malian descent. He is a youth international for France, first receiving a call with the under-18 in March 2023, and making his debut during a 4-3 friendly win to Germany, during witch he also scored his first goal. He was subsequently called for the Maurice Revello Tournament.

SUMMARY: Mamadou Diakhon (born 22 September 2005) is a French professional footballer who plays as a forward for  Ligue 1 club Reims.
